## Summary

Describe the documentation, lab, script, or security portfolio improvement.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New lab or project artifact
- [ ] Script or automation update
- [ ] Detection or analysis update
- [ ] GRC or policy update

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Content is accurate and professional.
- [ ] No secrets, private data, or sensitive screenshots are included.
- [ ] Markdown formatting is clean.
- [ ] References are included where useful.
- [ ] The change supports the cybersecurity portfolio goal.
